message.content:
Design a detailed implementation plan for "Phase A: Tactile UI + Chat/Notifications on mocks" for the Rearden hiring platform. ## Project Context - Turborepo monorepo, web app at apps/web (Vite + React 19) - Styling: SCSS Modules with camelCase class names, variables bridged to CSS custom properties - Animation: Motion v12 (`import { motion } from "motion/react"`) - 10 color themes already implemented via CSS custom properties + data-theme attribute - State: React Context (ThemeContext exists), custom hooks (useApi, useSearch, useVideoUpload) - Router: react-router-dom v7, 4 routes: /, /search, /candidate/:id, /register - All wrapped in Layout component with Navbar + AnimatePresence ## Current Component Architecture ### Layout (Layout.tsx) ```tsx
``` Layout.module.scss: `.layout { min-height: 100vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column; }` `.main { flex: 1; padding-top: $navbarHeight; }` ### Button (Button.tsx) Polymorphic motion.button/motion.a. Currently: `whileHover={{ scale: 1.02 }}` `whileTap={{ scale: 0.98 }}`. Variants: primary (gradient bg + shadow), secondary (glass + accent border), ghost (transparent). Sizes: sm/md/lg. Button.module.scss uses: `$accentPurple`, `$accentPurpleLight`, glass mixins, shadows. `.ghost:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05) }` — this rgba needs fixing for theme bridge. ### CandidateCard (CandidateCard.tsx) `motion.div` with `whileHover={{ y: -4 }}`. Shows thumbnail, name, title, location, skills (max 4), optional score badge and match reason. ### PageTransition `motion.div` with fade+slide. Currently uses `duration: 0.3, ease: "easeInOut"` — should become spring. ### SearchBar Custom search input with rotating placeholders, glowBorder animation, glass styling. ### CandidateProfile page Two-column grid: video left (sticky), info right. Has "Contact Candidate" button that currently does nothing. ### Navbar Fixed top, glass bg, logo + links (Search, Register) + theme Select. Has motion nav indicator. ### Pages - Landing: hero, features grid, stats, CTA - Search: search bar + candidate card grid with staggered animations - CandidateProfile: video + full profile info - Register: form with video upload ## What We Need to Build (Phase A) ### A1: Tactile Interaction System Goal: Make every click feel physical, like pressing buttons on a Nintendo controller. Changes needed: 1. **Button.tsx** — Enhanced whileTap: scale(0.95) + translateY(2px), spring transition (stiffness: 400, damping: 25), add CSS inset shadow on :active 2. **Button.module.scss** — Add active state: `box-shadow: inset 0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2)` on press, transition the shadow 3. **CandidateCard** — Add whileTap scale(0.98), spring hover 4. **PageTransition** — Replace easeInOut with spring transition 5. **All motion animations** — Replace `ease` with spring configs throughout Landing.tsx, Search.tsx, CandidateProfile.tsx 6. **global.scss** — Add CSS noise texture on body background via SVG filter for subtle grain 7. **_variables.scss or _tokens.scss** — Add standard spring config as CSS variables or SCSS variables ### A2: Sound System Goal: Subtle audio feedback on interactions. New files: 1. **src/hooks/useSound.ts** — Hook that loads and plays short audio clips. Respects a global mute setting from SoundContext. 2. **src/contexts/SoundContext.tsx** — Provider with enabled/disabled state, persisted to localStorage. Exposes `playSound(name)` and `soundEnabled` + `toggleSound`. 3. **src/assets/sounds/** — Directory for sound files (click.mp3, hover.mp3, success.mp3, error.mp3, notify.mp3, navigate.mp3). These need to be sourced externally. 4. Integration into Button (click sound on tap), Navbar links (navigate sound), SearchBar (subtle hover), notifications (notify sound). ### A3: Layout Redesign — Command Center Goal: Add persistent right sidebar with notifications + chat panels, like Remilia.net's right panel. Changes: 1. **Layout.tsx** — Add Sidebar component alongside main content. New layout structure: ``` .layout { display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .body { display: flex; padding-top: navbarHeight; } .main { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .sidebar { width: 320px; flex-shrink: 0; height: calc(100vh - navbarHeight); position: sticky; top: navbarHeight; display: flex; flex-direction: column; border-left: 1px solid var(--glass-border); } ``` 2. **Sidebar.tsx** — New component containing NotificationPanel (top) and ChatPanel (bottom, flex: 1) 3. **Navbar.tsx** — Add notification bell icon with badge counter, add sidebar toggle button for mobile 4. Responsive: On mobile/tablet, sidebar becomes a slide-out drawer (opened via toggle button) ### A4: Notifications Panel (Mock Data) New files: 1. **src/components/Sidebar/Sidebar.tsx + .module.scss** — Container with two sections 2. **src/components/NotificationPanel/NotificationPanel.tsx + .module.scss** — List of notifications with action buttons 3. **src/components/NotificationItem/NotificationItem.tsx + .module.scss** — Individual notification: icon, message, time, action buttons (View/Dismiss) 4. **src/data/mockNotifications.ts** — Mock notification data with types: new_candidate, interview_scheduled, message_received, status_change 5. **src/contexts/NotificationContext.tsx** — Context managing notifications array, unread count, dismiss/markRead actions. Uses setTimeout to simulate new notifications arriving. Notification types for hiring platform: - "New candidate match: Sarah Chen (92% match)" [View Profile] [Dismiss] - "Interview scheduled with Alex Kim — Tomorrow 2pm" [View] [Dismiss] - "New message from Jordan Lee" [Open Chat] [Dismiss] - "Status update: Maria Garcia moved to Interview stage" [View] [Dismiss] ### A5: Chat Panel (Mock Data) New files: 1. **src/components/ChatPanel/ChatPanel.tsx + .module.scss** — Two states: conversation list view, or open conversation view 2. **src/components/ChatMessage/ChatMessage.tsx + .module.scss** — Message bubble with avatar, text, timestamp, sent/received alignment 3. **src/components/ChatInput/ChatInput.tsx + .module.scss** — Text input with send button, typing indicator 4. **src/components/ConversationList/ConversationList.tsx + .module.scss** — List of conversations showing avatar, name, last message preview, unread badge 5. **src/data/mockConversations.ts** — Mock conversation data with candidate names, messages, timestamps 6. **src/contexts/ChatContext.tsx** — Context managing conversations, active conversation, messages, send message action (mock — just adds to local state) Chat integration with CandidateProfile: - When on /candidate/:id, ChatPanel auto-opens conversation with that candidate (if exists) or shows "Start conversation" button - "Contact Candidate" button in CandidateProfile.tsx opens/focuses the chat panel ## Design Principles - Every interaction should have visual AND audio feedback - Spring animations everywhere (no linear ease) - Panels should feel like physical objects (borders, subtle shadows, not just glass blur) - Sound is opt-in (enabled by default, easy toggle) - Mock data should feel realistic (real names, realistic messages, plausible timings) - Mobile-first responsive: sidebar collapses to drawer ## Implementation Order A1 → A2 → A3 → A4 → A5 (each step produces a working build) ## Key Constraints - SCSS Modules only (camelCase class names) - Motion v12 API (`from "motion/react"`) - No new dependencies except possibly howler.js for sound (or use native Web Audio API) - All mock data in src/data/ directory - Theme system must continue working (all new components use existing SCSS variables) Please provide a detailed, file-by-file implementation plan with the exact changes needed for each file, organized by phase. Include estimated file counts per phase.

content.text: I'll start by thoroughly exploring the current codebase to understand the existing architecture, then design a detailed implementation plan.
